EN.title: Services inventory (Private)
EN.description: Single table of VaultWares + Prom‑King services: URL, where it runs, repo, and visibility.
EN.body:
# Services inventory (Private)

This page is a **single source of truth table** for “what we run”.

It exists so that:

- a non-technical person can understand *what each URL is*
- an assistant can quickly map a URL → machine → repo → deployment flow

> If you add a new public URL, update this table the same day.

Related:
- `operations/deployment-flow` (canonical deployment flow)
- `operations/health-ledger` (service health, Probe Joker, Alarm Joker, Token Joker)
- `operations/deploy-alerts` (deploy failure and bad-signature alerts)

## Table

| Service | URL | Where (runtime) | GitHub repo | Visibility |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Main website | `https://vaultwares.ca` | `/var/www/vaultwares-website/dist` (SPA) | `vaultwares-website` | Public |
| Docs | `https://docs.vaultwares.ca` | `/var/www/vaultwares-docs/dist` (static) | `vaultwares-docs` | Tailnet-only |
| API | `https://api.vaultwares.ca` | nginx HTTPS edge on `greencloud-vps` → tailnet proxy to `http://100.71.101.21:9001` | `vaultwares-pipelines` | Tailnet-only; gateway secret is required by app gateways but is not currently set in the `api.vaultwares.ca` nginx vhost |
| vault-flows SPA | `https://flows.vaultwares.ca` | `/var/www/vault-flows/dist` (SPA) | `vault-flows` | Public |
| noddit.org | `https://noddit.org` | `/var/www/vault-flows/dist` (SPA) | `vault-flows` | Public |
| GitHub webhooks | `https://hooks.vaultwares.ca/github` | nginx → `vw-webhookd` → `127.0.0.1:9033` | (ops service) | Public (required by GitHub) |
| Secrets manager | `https://warden.vaultwares.ca` | `vw-secretsd` → `127.0.0.1:9444` | (ops service) | Tailnet-only |
| (alias) secrets | `https://secrets.vaultwares.ca` | redirect → `warden.vaultwares.ca` | (ops config) | Tailnet-only |
| Prom‑King prelanding/front door | `https://prom-king.xyz` | WordPress front door at `/var/www/prom-king.xyz/public`; prelanding source repo is tracked separately | `Prom-King/prelanding-page` | Public |
| FullXXX prelanding/front door | `https://fullxxx.video` | WordPress front door at `/var/www/fullxxx.video/public`; FullXXX front-door variant is tracked separately | `Prom-King/prelanding-page` | Public |
| Prom‑King tube site | `https://prom-king.xyz` | WordPress plugin `/var/www/prom-king.xyz/public/wp-content/plugins/promking-tube` | `Prom-King/tube-sites` | Public |
| FullXXX tube site | `https://fullxxx.video` | WordPress plugin `/var/www/fullxxx.video/public/wp-content/plugins/fullxxx-video` | `Prom-King/tube-sites` | Public |
| Prom‑King link sharing | `https://links.prom-king.xyz` | Fastify on `127.0.0.1:3001` | `Prom-King/link-sharing` | Public |
| FullXXX link sharing | `https://links.fullxxx.video` | Fastify on `127.0.0.1:3001` | `Prom-King/link-sharing` | Public |

## Deployment and alert note

Every repo in this table must follow the same control-plane model:

- GitHub is only an event source (webhook)
- deploy/test/probe jobs happen inside the tailnet on the configured project
  target host
- **no GitHub Actions deploys**
- alert severity is determined by the Health Ledger alert profile, not by the
  host that receives the webhook
- local Ollama/Gemma remediation is allowed only for explicitly permitted
  non-production Low flows

Source of truth: `operations/deployment-flow`.

## Ops surfaces on `greencloud-vps` (not user-facing)

| Surface | Listener / unit | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `vw-webhookd` | systemd service, `127.0.0.1:9033` | Verifies GitHub webhook signatures + dispatches per-repo deploy scripts. Runs as `vwdeploy`. |
| `vaultwares-hooks` | systemd service, `127.0.0.1:8787` | Tailnet-only webhook handler (uvicorn). |
| `vw-secretsd` | systemd service, `127.0.0.1:9444` | Local secrets shim behind `warden.vaultwares.ca`. |
| `health-ledger-probe.service` | systemd service | Active Probe Joker loop under `/opt/health-ledger`; writes Health Ledger events and rollups. |
| `vw-deny-watch.timer` | systemd timer, disabled 2026-06-03 | Legacy GitHub issue writer for webhook `bad_signature` clusters. Replaced by Health Ledger direction. |
| `vw-token-expiry-watch.timer` | systemd timer, disabled 2026-06-03 | Legacy GitHub issue writer for token expiry. Replaced by Token Joker direction. |

## Notes on the table above

- `fullxxx.video` and `prom-king.xyz` are **WordPress installs** under
  `/var/www/<site>/public/`. Their front-door/prelanding behavior and their
  tube plugins are tracked separately in Health Ledger so the repo/runtime
  ownership is explicit. The plugins driving the catalogs live under
  `wp-content/plugins/{fullxxx-video,promking-tube,tube-shared}` and are
  rsynced from `/var/www/tube-sites-src/` by the deploy script.
- The GitHub org **is `Prom-King`** (capital `P`, capital `K`, hyphen) for
  every repo in this list — the lowercase form `prom-king/...` won't match.

QC.title: Inventaire des services (Privé)
QC.description: Table unique des services VaultWares + Prom‑King: URL, où ça roule, repo, visibilité.
QC.body:
# Inventaire des services (Privé)

Cette page est une **table source de vérité** pour répondre à : “Qu’est-ce qu’on roule, pis où?”

Elle sert à :

- aider quelqu’un de non-tech à comprendre *c’est quoi chaque URL*
- aider un assistant à faire le lien **URL → machine → repo → déploiement**

> Si on ajoute une nouvelle URL publique, on met à jour cette table la même journée.

## Table

| Service | URL | Où (runtime) | Repo GitHub | Visibilité |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Site principal | `https://vaultwares.ca` | `/var/www/vaultwares-website/dist` (SPA) | `vaultwares-website` | Public |
| Docs | `https://docs.vaultwares.ca` | `/var/www/vaultwares-docs/dist` (statique) | `vaultwares-docs` | Tailnet-only |
| API | `https://api.vaultwares.ca` | bord HTTPS nginx sur `greencloud-vps` → proxy tailnet vers `http://100.71.101.21:9001` | `vaultwares-pipelines` | Tailnet-only; le secret de gateway est requis par les gateways applicatives, mais il n'est pas actuellement injecté par le vhost nginx `api.vaultwares.ca` |
| vault-flows SPA | `https://flows.vaultwares.ca` | `/var/www/vault-flows/dist` (SPA) | `vault-flows` | Public |
| noddit.org | `https://noddit.org` | `/var/www/vault-flows/dist` (SPA) | `vault-flows` | Public |
| Webhooks GitHub | `https://hooks.vaultwares.ca/github` | nginx → `vw-webhookd` → `127.0.0.1:9033` | (service ops) | Public (requis par GitHub) |
| Gestionnaire de secrets | `https://warden.vaultwares.ca` | `vw-secretsd` → `127.0.0.1:9444` | (service ops) | Tailnet-only |
| (alias) secrets | `https://secrets.vaultwares.ca` | redirection → `warden.vaultwares.ca` | (config ops) | Tailnet-only |
| Front door / prelanding Prom‑King | `https://prom-king.xyz` | front door WordPress à `/var/www/prom-king.xyz/public`; le repo prelanding est suivi séparément | `Prom-King/prelanding-page` | Public |
| Front door / prelanding FullXXX | `https://fullxxx.video` | front door WordPress à `/var/www/fullxxx.video/public`; la variante FullXXX est suivie séparément | `Prom-King/prelanding-page` | Public |
| Tube site Prom‑King | `https://prom-king.xyz` | plugin WordPress `/var/www/prom-king.xyz/public/wp-content/plugins/promking-tube` | `Prom-King/tube-sites` | Public |
| Tube site FullXXX | `https://fullxxx.video` | plugin WordPress `/var/www/fullxxx.video/public/wp-content/plugins/fullxxx-video` | `Prom-King/tube-sites` | Public |
| Link sharing Prom‑King | `https://links.prom-king.xyz` | Fastify sur `127.0.0.1:3001` | `Prom-King/link-sharing` | Public |
| Link sharing FullXXX | `https://links.fullxxx.video` | Fastify sur `127.0.0.1:3001` | `Prom-King/link-sharing` | Public |

## Note de déploiement (pareil pour tout le monde)

Chaque repo dans cette table doit suivre **le même modèle de déploiement** :

- GitHub sert juste à envoyer l’événement (webhook)
- le déploiement se fait dans le tailnet sur `greencloud-vps`
- **aucun déploiement via GitHub Actions**

Source de vérité : `operations/deployment-flow`.

## Notes sur Prom-King / FullXXX

- `fullxxx.video` et `prom-king.xyz` sont des **installations WordPress** sous
  `/var/www/<site>/public/`.
- Leur front door/prelanding et leurs plugins tube sont suivis séparément dans
  Health Ledger pour rendre l'ownership repo/runtime explicite.
- Les plugins qui alimentent les catalogues vivent sous
  `wp-content/plugins/{fullxxx-video,promking-tube,tube-shared}` et sont
  rsynced depuis `/var/www/tube-sites-src/` par le script de déploiement.
- L'org GitHub est **`Prom-King`** pour ces repos. La forme minuscule
  `prom-king/...` ne doit pas être utilisée comme nom de repo.
